top_signals.title: Hong Kong Will Inspire China’s Confidence on Capital Flows, Says City’s Financial Secretary
top_signals.summary: Hong Kong Financial Secretary Paul Chan said the city would attempt to “inspire the confidence” of Chinese authorities, after Beijing’s sweeping crackdown on illicit overseas investment cast a chill over banks in the city.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Japan’s producer prices jump again on elevated energy costs
top_signals.summary: The measure of input prices for Japanese firms rose 0.9% in May from a month earlier, and April's increase was revised higher, the Bank of Japan says.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Trump family got about $500M from crypto venture — but investors saw steep losses
top_signals.summary: Eric Trump and Donald Trump Jr. celebrated a deal with Alt5 Sigma that generated roughly $500 million for the Trump family. The company's shares are down 93%.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
